title: John Deere 568 Round Baler — Pickup Arm Hydraulic Cylinder Replacement (Step-by-Step)
description_summary: Full walkthrough on R&R of the 568 pickup-arm hydraulic cylinder. Covers pin removal, cylinder support during the swap, bleeding the line, and torque specs. Tools list at the start.

title: JD 568 Baler Repair — Cylinder, Pivot Pin, and What to Inspect While You Are In There
description_summary: Field repair walkthrough on a 568 hydraulic cylinder swap. Heavy emphasis on what to check while the cylinder is off (pivot pin wear, bushing replacement, hose chafe). Recorded in the Texas Panhandle.
